title: Multi-Vector Embeddings in Qdrant | Qdrant Multi-Vector Search
summary: Tutorial on configuring Qdrant for multi-vector search using the MaxSim comparator, indexing documents with FastEmbed local inference, and querying with ColBERT embeddings. Covers collection setup, HNSW disabling for MaxSim compatibility, and on-disk vector storage for memory-constrained environments.
